commit.message:
fix: use SHCreateDefaultContextMenu with explicit registry keys to load all extension handlers

Replace IShellFolder::GetUIObjectOf with SHCreateDefaultContextMenu —
the same function Explorer uses internally. The key difference is that
DEFCONTEXTMENU.aKeys lets us pass the registry keys (HKCR\*, HKCR\<ext>,
HKCR\<ProgID>, HKCR\AllFilesystemObjects) that the shell uses to enumerate
dynamic context menu handlers. Without these, only static verbs from the
IShellFolder itself appear (e.g. "Run as administrator" from HKCR\exefile\
shell\runas), while COM-based extension handlers like 7-Zip and Notepad++
(registered under HKCR\*\shellex\ContextMenuHandlers) are skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: 코드 개선 — 중복 제거, 버퍼 OOM 방지, 리소스 누수 수정

1. generator/src/common.rs 신규 모듈
   - connect_tcp, wait_deadline, write_zeroes, build_path, resolve_tls_sni,
     record_{attempt,established,failed,timeout,response} 공통화
   - http1 / http2 / tcp 3파일에서 동일 함수 복붙 제거

2. 대용량 페이로드 버퍼 OOM 방지
   - tcp.rs: vec![0u8; tx_bytes] → write_zeroes (64KiB 청크 전송)
   - tcp.rs: vec![0u8; rx_bytes.max(65536)] → 64KiB 고정 io_buf + 루프 수신
   - http1.rs: vec![0u8; req_body_bytes] → write_zeroes (2곳)
   - http2.rs: Bytes::from(vec![0u8; req_body_bytes]) → Bytes::from_static 청크
   - responder/lib.rs: body 매 요청 할당 → Arc<Bytes> 1회 할당 후 O(1) clone

3. Orchestrator 시작 실패 시 리소스 누수 수정
   - Loopback/Namespace/ExternalPort 모드 실패 경로에서 responder.stop_all() 호출
   - ExternalPort 실패 시 정책 라우팅(policy routing)도 정리

4. NamespaceManager setup 실패 시 롤백
   - setup_inner() + cleanup_resources() 분리
   - 중간 실패 시 이미 생성된 namespace/veth 자동 삭제
   - teardown()이 cleanup_resources()를 위임

5. docs/IMPROVEMENTS.md 신규 — 전체 개선점 목록 문서화

commit.message:
fix: pass hwndHost to GetUIObjectOf, add SetForegroundWindow + OleInitialize

Three fixes:

1. Create helper window BEFORE GetUIObjectOf and pass it as hwndOwner.
   Some shell extensions (7-Zip etc.) inspect hwndOwner during context
   menu creation and silently skip their items when it is null or from
   a foreign process.

2. Call SetForegroundWindow(hwndHost) before TrackPopupMenuEx. Without
   this the menu's internal message loop never receives keyboard events,
   so Escape (and all other keys) are ignored.

3. Call OleInitialize/OleUninitialize on the STA thread. Some shell
   handlers require OLE to be fully initialised (not just CoInitialize)
   before they register their menu items. PostMessage(WM_NULL) after
   TrackPopupMenuEx flushes leftover messages per MSDN guidance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(viewer): replace vt100 pipeline with native tmux rendering

Pipe raw PTY bytes directly into a tmux pane on the viewer side,
letting tmux handle all terminal rendering natively. This eliminates
rendering glitches, gains native scrollback, and simplifies ViewerState
from 25 fields to 8.

- Add pty-viewer and viewer-info CLI subcommands
- Add create_viewer_session() to TmuxManager with Ctrl+G info popup
- Rewrite connect_viewer() to use tmux attach/detach flow
- Simplify viewer render to transitional status screen
- Remove vt100 cell-by-cell rendering pipeline (-872 net lines)

commit.message:
bump version to 0.3.18

Fix Word/Excel/PPT/PDF document parsing bugs:

1. Word merged cells: deduplicate cell objects + align column count
2. Word multiple tables: extract largest table only (by row count)
3. Word fully-merged rows: skip rows with only 1 unique cell
4. Auto-load retry loop: mark failed loads to prevent infinite retry

Add comprehensive test suite:
- test_word_parsing.py: 5 Word edge cases
- test_all_formats.py: 13 test cases (Word/Excel/PPT/PDF)
- All tests passing

commit.message:
fix: persist data in localStorage to survive Vercel cold starts

Replace in-memory API calls with localStorage persistence. Serverless
functions reset on cold starts, causing deleted merchants to reappear
and new tasks to vanish after refresh. All CRUD operations now read/write
directly to localStorage, which survives page reloads. Also removes the
Nandita auto-recreation guard that prevented her from being deleted.

which renders bare children only.

commit.message:
Fix CORS: switch n8n fetch calls to URLSearchParams to avoid preflight

n8n Cloud returns 500 on OPTIONS preflight requests, blocking all POST
requests with JSON bodies from GitHub Pages. Switching to URLSearchParams
(application/x-www-form-urlencoded) sends a simple request with no preflight,
bypassing the CORS block entirely. Affects updateSaleStatus, saveNotes,
and sendFarewellMessage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 12–18 + Kardashev ML: gap fixes, menu v2, synthetic training

Phase 12–17 (previously uncommitted):
- BC11 pattern analysis hardening (Bonferroni, harmonics, non-grav bounds)
- API layer: real persistence, monitoring, batch detection, orbital history
- Data layer: SBDB nongrav fix, observation arc wiring, Horizons history
- Menu redesign: ANEOSMenuV2 (14 options), ANEOSMenuBase helpers
- σ validation integrity audit; honest docstrings; Wilson CIs

Phase 18 — Menu gap analysis + fixes:
- GAP-1/2: aneos_api.services → aneos_api.database; save_analysis_result dict fix
- GAP-3: _show_db_results uses dict .get() (not getattr); column names updated
- GAP-4: run_200_year_poll passes interactive=False (no EOF crash)
- GAP-5: print() in _detect_batch → show_info/show_error
- GAP-7: evidence_breakdown added to DetectionResult.analysis dict
- GAP-8: _parse_elements_table rewritten with epoch accumulation (2 epochs → 2 rows)
- GAP-9: PatternAnalysisConfig harmonics=True
- GAP-10: format_sigma σ<2 → INCONCLUSIVE (removes NOTABLE/ROUTINE)
- M-1/2/3: Options 12–14 added (_start_api_server, _detection_analytics, _show_help)

Kardashev Synthetic ML (new):
- aneos_core/datasets/kardashev_generator.py — 14 scenarios K0.5–K2.0
  (dead_rocket_stage, solar_sail, active_ion_probe, mining_tug,
   deep_space_vehicle, automated_constructor, resource_platform,
   dyson_swarm_element, interstellar_launcher, stellar_trawler,
   population_coordinator, megastructure_fragment,
   stellar_engine_component, network_statistical_anomaly)
- aneos_core/datasets/kardashev_training.py — IsolationForest + RandomForest
  pipeline; hardcoded ground-truth set (2020 SO, J002E3, WT1190F, Roadster-type,
  Apophis, Bennu, Eros, Toutatis, Itokawa, 2001 YB5)
- CONFIRMED BENEFIT: RF AUC=1.000; separation=+0.870; all confirmed artificials
  score >0.94 P(artificial); all confirmed naturals score <0.46
- Primary discriminating feature: log10_density (hollow vs rocky), then albedo

Tests: 235 pass, 0 fail (+15 phase18 + 15 kardashev-gen + 11 kardashev-training)
README updated to v1.0.0 Phase 18.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restore per-cell overview colours; fix quadrant split to always 4 pages

Overview page:
- Per-cell colour drawing restored (no numbers)
- Grid height capped at 45% of page height so legend always fully visible
- header_bottom still derived from lower of instructions/legend bottom

Quadrant pages:
- Always exactly 4 pages (2×2 split) regardless of grid size
- row_mid = rows // 2, col_mid = cols // 2 gives equal halves
- Examples: 100×100 → 4×50×50, 120×80 → 4×60×40, 90×70 → 4×45×35
